/usr/bin/ar qc ../../lib/libtidyLib.a CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/access.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/alloc.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/attrask.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/attrdict.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/attrget.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/attrs.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/buffio.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/charsets.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/clean.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/config.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/entities.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/fileio.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/iconvtc.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/istack.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/lexer.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/localize.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/mappedio.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/parser.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/pprint.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/streamio.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/tagask.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/tags.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/tidylib.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/tmbstr.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/utf8.c.o CMakeFiles/tidyLib.dir/win32tc.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../lib/libtidyLib.a
